name: Vegetable Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Rotini pasta, cooked and drained
2 cups Frozen broccoli and cauliflower, thawed and drained
2 1/4 oz Can of sliced ripe olives, drained
6 oz Jar of marinated artichoke hearts, drained and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine pasta, onions, zucchini, broccoli and cauliflower, carrots, celery, peas, olives and artichoke hearts.
2. In a small bowl, combine dressing ingredients; mix well.
3. Pour dressing over pasta and vegetables and toss.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
Serves: 16
From: Taste of Home Magazine Posted by: Debbie Carlson (D.CARLSON - GEnie)
